programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team help a dog lost during a windstorm. Dr. Baier treats a small bird with a big personality. Susan rescues a paralysed dog.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a dog with a serious illness. Mel and her daughter rescue a baby squirrel. Dr. Jeff and Dr. Petra team up to save a cat hit by a car.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Jeff treats a skittish Savannah cat with an unusual condition. Plus, the team races to save a stray dog as it runs toward the freeway.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Robert and Terri take to the skies to release some sea turtles near the Great Barrier Reef. Bindi eagerly awaits the birth of the zoo's tiger cub.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego
programme.desc: The keepers prepare a black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Plus, the zoo staff care for a 15-year-old lion and his mate.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson meets an outdoor cat, Henery, who protests living inside by soaking the place in pee.

programme.title: Cats 101
programme.sub-title: Manx, Burmese, Siberian, Russian Blue, Cornish Rex
programme.desc: Meet the Manx, Burmese, Siberian, Russian Blue, Cornish Rex, and Singapura cats.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: On the Gulf of Mexico, a routine inspection turns bad for Carmen Rickel and the Marine Tactical Operations Group. Kyle Hendley wrangles a rattlesnake.

programme.title: The Aquarium
programme.desc: The staff are concerned when a beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill; the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species.

programme.title: Deadliest Place On Earth
programme.desc: Survivors recount their dangerous encounters with Australian wildlife.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
programme.desc: Fisherman and adventurer Jeremy Wade is on an epic journey to catch a prehistoric monster: the man-sized pike in the lakes of Ireland. Will he find it?

programme.desc: The ranchers enjoy friendship and fellowship as the community comes to help brand and vaccinate the cattle. However, harsh weather threatens to derail the day.

programme.title: Fish or Die

programme.desc: Agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds. A trespassing investigation leads to a dangerous encounter.

programme.desc: Brandon investigates the nocturnal habits of giraffes, and the herd he locates has two males fighting for dominance.

programme.title: Swimming with Men
programme.desc: Eric joins an all-male group of synchronised swimmers, discovering that making patterns in a pool can, for a couple of hours at least, smooth out the bumps in his life.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug and Abi take their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. They are in the midst of a difficult divorce, and have asked the kids to keep it a secret from their family.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic eastern European people and then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman, and a war escalates.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: Biopic of John Lennon's early life. Abandoned by his mother and raised by a prim and proper aunt, the rebellious teen is soon drawn to rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: Stardust (2020)
programme.desc: Meet David before Bowie, one of the greatest icons in music history. But who was the young man behind the many faces?

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: The mixed-race daughter, Dido Elizabeth Belle, of Royal Navy Captain Sir John Lindsay is raised by aristocratic Great-uncle Lord William Murray, 1st Earl of Mansfield in eighteenth century England.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: A young Irish woman travels to 1950s Brooklyn and falls in love with her new life, until a family tragedy forces her to choose between the two countries and the people in them.

programme.title: Viceroy's House
programme.desc: The final Viceroy of India, Lord Mountbatten, is tasked with overseeing the transition of British India to independence, but meets with conflict as different sides clash.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.title: A Long Way Down
programme.desc: Four people considering ending their own lives suddenly find a little sunshine when they come together on New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: In this superb drama set in pre-World War I Paris, an ageing courtesan has an ill-fated love affair with the son of her rival.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveller, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attache for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.desc: A weary assassin hires a gangster's cocky stepson as his driver. A stunning woman upsets their plans in this witty caper starring Tim Roth and Talulah Riley.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: In rural Ireland, an ex-boxer who has an autistic son and is the feared enforcer for a drug-dealing family has his loyalties tested when he's asked to kill for the first time.

programme.desc: When a series of brutal murders occur in London, the community believes that a legendary dark creature must be responsible.

programme.title: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: A big-hearted family man's plan for a peaceful getaway at a lakeside resort is ruined when his obnoxious brother-in-law turns up with his weirdo brood.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell Of Fear
programme.desc: Frank Drebin, the idiot detective, uncovers a plot by super villain Robert Goulet to sabotage the USA's energy policy. More slapstick mayhem in the first sequel to the comedy classic.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: An Irish-American cop in New York befriends an 'innocent' immigrant from Belfast. He turns out to be an IRA rebel on a terrorist mission.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In a future world devastated by disease, a convict is sent back in time to gather information about the man-made virus that wiped out most of the human population.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: A big-hearted family man's plan for a peaceful getaway at a lakeside resort is ruined when his obnoxious brother-in-law turns up with his weirdo brood.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests John Rambo, he must make a daring escape and prepare himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous parachute drop, Rambo is left stranded in the jungles with only his combat knife and bow and arrows to protect him.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: Thomas Dooley is an unorthodox narcotics cop who teams with an independently minded police dog in this hilarious action-comedy.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer backs the reopening of an old theatre and watches over a fragile friend. Lloyd's Chinese gum becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine dates a saxophonist she deems sponge worthy, though he will not do everything. Jerry blabs to a bandmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer bonds with a caddy who sharpens his golf game. George's bosses eye a promotion when they think he works earlier and later than everyone.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine strains her neck reaching for a bike, then offers it to whoever fixes her. Susan's cousin gives her baby the name George had saved for his first child.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry surprises his parents by buying them a new car. George reconsiders his engagement when a friend of Elaine tells him that she could have set him up with actress Marisa Tomei.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's fixation on Marisa alarms Susan. Elaine rings Jerry in Florida wanting to join him. Elaine gets Marisa's number so George can claim an alibi.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Pre trip tests show traces of opium, so Peterman fires Elaine. Jerry's parents linger in New York while waiting to move back to Florida.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Susan's old roommate hands Jerry a package, and he misplaces his own. Frank turns George's room into a billiard room.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is happy because his wedding is delayed three months and excited because Jerry is going to go out with Susan's best friend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry uses Elaine to prove a clerk wrong about an expensive jacket, and the clerk asks her out. George hosts an unwanted wig master from a Broadway musical.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George guards his ATM code from Susan. Elaine is baffled when a man remembers a party in detail but not her.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine invites Susan to a clothing exhibition, which worries Kramer. Jerry befriends his pool guy and cannot shake him.

programme.desc: Finding out that her favoured method of birth control is only available in a limited supply, Elaine must decide if her boyfriend is worthy.

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George doesn't hear the details on a project that Wilhelm wants him to champion. Peterman wants Elaine to bid on some golf clubs at an auction and gets into a bidding war.

programme.desc: Wilhelm is delighted with the job George did on the project. The detective on the case thinks he's found Jerry's car, damaged beyond recognition.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After George's off hand remark, Jerry and Elaine await a couple's split. Elaine debuts a new hairdo and resumes driving, which makes Jerry carsick.

programme.desc: With the wedding nearing, George and Susan order invitations. Jerry meets Jeannie, his female counterpart, after nearly geting hit by a car..

programme.desc: As George tries to put Susan behind him, Elaine is given control of J Peterman's business.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is suspected of killing his own fiancee, while Kramer falls for Jerry's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine meets three friends who are the exact opposite of Jerry, George and Kramer. Then, George uses Susan's death to attract women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's strange dancing kills staff respect. George cultivates a bad boy image. Jerry becomes an underground legend after bootlegging a new movie.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George tries to woo a photo clerk with pictures of himself. Elaine's reputation blocks treatment. Kramer offers to secure a refund for Jerry's busted stereo.

programme.desc: Elaine's promotion of a mail room clerk sparks a mutiny, Jerry discovers his girlfriend's mother is dating Bania, and Kramer brings Frank out of retirement to cook.

programme.desc: Jerry's fame in Japan endears Kramer to a group of tourists and inspires George to revive their TV pilot.

programme.desc: As a restaurant's bright lights keep Kramer awake, Elaine's job is threatened after she buys George an expensive hat on the company's account.

programme.desc: While abstinence makes George smarter, it has the opposite effect on Elaine. Kramer opens a smoker's lounge in his apartment as Jerry prepares to speak at a junior high school.

programme.desc: George squares off against a shipwreck survivor over a new apartment. Meanwhile, Jerry attempts to help Newman get a much sought-after transfer to Hawaii.

programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Direct and in-depth. Interviews exploring the minds and motivations of the leaders, visionaries, artists and entrepreneurs who are changing our world.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: From prevention to cure! The groundbreaking world of Japanese medical technology and healthcare. For your healthy lifestyle, this program shows tips of superfoods and easy exercises.

programme.title: Psycho Goreman
programme.desc: In this light-hearted yet violent cosmic, comedy adventure, an intergalactic warlord becomes enslaved to a pair of Earth children after they unwittingly resurrect him.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: As the seconds tick down to midnight, an ex-con becomes a reluctant hero trapped by a masked "Collector" in a maze of lethal invention while trying to rescue the very family he came to rob.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: The story of a teenager who struggles through school and family life by escaping into a fantasy world of magic and monsters.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe is a hired gun who rescues trafficked girls, using brutal methods against those responsible.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Tara Heyes finds herself as the obsession of a sadistic murderer known as Art the Clown.

programme.title: Terrifier 2
programme.desc: Resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County to terrorise a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

programme.title: Deliver Us
programme.desc: When a nun in a remote convent claims immaculate conception, priests investigate, concerned she will give birth to twin boys: one the Messiah, the other the Anti-Christ.

programme.title: Howling VI: The Freaks
programme.desc: A villainous carnival owner traps a young werewolf to include in his growing menagerie of inhuman exhibits.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: A mysterious woman on the run, and the resourceful fixer assigned to bring her in. Their two unique stories inextricably link, as the stakes of the pursuit rise to apocalyptic proportions.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: While driving through Nebraska two young lovers stumble upon a cult made up of murderous, demon-worshiping children. Based on a Stephen King horror story.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Hellbound: Hellraiser II
programme.desc: Kristy Cotton is in a psychiatric hospital reliving the hellish events pertaining to a certain puzzle box that contains deadly spirits.

programme.title: Hell House LLC II: The Abbadon Hotel
programme.desc: Eight years after a hotel's tragic opening, an investigative journalist is convinced key evidence remains in the abandoned hotel.

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: In the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town, a notorious criminal must break an evil curse in order to rescue an abducted girl who has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning and murder.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: Wrong Place
programme.desc: A meth cook hunts down the former police chief in order to silence him before he can deliver eyewitness testimony against his family.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Noroi: The Curse
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist named Kobayashi goes missing shortly after completing a documentary. What begins as an investigation into strange noises soon evolves into the chilling mystery of a demonic entity.

programme.title: Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Emma must uncover the dark secret behind a cursed radio to survive and protect her family.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: Hellraiser
programme.desc: A horrifying, living-dead version of Julia's husband appears and coerces her to seduce and kill men so that he can feed on their blood to regain his flesh.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Thesis
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: The radiation from a fallen satellite causes the recently deceased to rise from the grave and seek the living to use as food.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II
programme.desc: The heroes in a half-shell are back. Our fearsome foursome go after the glowing canister that has slipped into the hands of the evil Shredder and his mutant allies, Rahzar and Tokka.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: When a magic sceptre accidentally transports April back through time to 16th-century Japan, the boys take off in hot pursuit, cowabungling their way right out of the sewers.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: The Thicket

programme.title: Day of the Dead

programme.desc: Life imitates art when the cast and crew of a low-budget zombie flick start to turn into the living dead.

programme.title: Men in Kilts
programme.desc: Sam and Graham immerse themselves in the rich culture of the Maori. The lads learn ceremonial dances, fighting techniques, and showcase the important honour of keeping ancient cultures alive.

programme.title: Men in Kilts
programme.desc: Sam and Graham embark on an immersive food and wine tour with local New Zealand businesses.

programme.title: Men in Kilts
programme.desc: For Sam and Graham's final adventure, the duo have a bath in hell, roll down mountains, and get a new makeover.

programme.title: Men in Kilts
programme.desc: A road trip with Sam and Graham. Scotland's cuisine and whisky are renowned throughout the world, for different reasons. In this episode, Sam and Graham explore the world's finest whisky, and dishes like Haggis.

programme.title: Men in Kilts
programme.desc: A road trip with Sam and Graham. Watch as the pair explore both classic and modern Scottish sport as they take on everything from lifting stones and throwing the Highland Games Hammer, to golfing and rugby.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan MacKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: By the Pricking of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft, while Jamie manages to rescue Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan MacKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire must reconcile her future with the life and love she left behind. Shifting back to 18th century, Jamie, Claire, and Murtagh arrive on the shores of France.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Life in Paris is not without its trials as Jamie struggles to triumph over the traumas of his past.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's days and nights are dominated by political machinations, while Claire finds solace in her healing skills.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is brought to L'Hopital Des Anges where doctors try to save her life and that of her unborn baby. King Louis asks Claire to judge two men accused of practising the dark arts - one an enemy, one a friend.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support for the Jacobite cause.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds, but Jamie's new business dealings jeopardise the couple's hopes for a simple life together.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illegal dealings.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknown to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. When the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship. Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines. Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After a leap of faith, Claire washes up on an island where survival is her only option. Navigating treacherous waters cripples the Artemis, so Jamie devises a joyful moment for his crew in the midst of setbacks.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica, bringing Jamie and Claire closer to their goal. During a ball on the island, the Fraser's encounter old allies and former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: It's bread week in the tent. The oven gloves are definitely off in this showstopper challenge where the bakers are tasked to showcase their depth of skill and talent in bread making.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: In the technical challenge, the bakers were to bake a dark chocolate with macadamia brownie. Judge Kiran was quite particular about this challenge.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: This episode's technical challenge is to make Judge Myra's lemon meringue pie. Some of the bakers have never done this before, while some of them are very confident.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The week's first technical challenge was a chocolate lava cake. But just what does it take to bake this delicious dessert perfectly?

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: This technical challenge is a classic bacon, mushroom and tomato quiche. June's favourite tart, apparently. The judges are looking for perfection.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: Biscuit week is here and we get to see the contestants try hard not to crumble under pressure. This episode's technical challenge is to bake checkerboard biscuits.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: For the signature challenge, the bakers were to bake a gluten-free cheesecake. They were allowed to customise it however they liked and that made our mouths water.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The semifinals are here and we are getting closer to the grand finale. Fantastic Four had to make the perfect macarons for the technical challenge.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: For the first challenge, the contestants had to make the perfect Schichttorte. According to the judges, the perfect Schichttorte would be 20-layered, have a flawless glaze and an overall perfect finishing.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: This year the bar has been raised: the bakers are bolder, the judges more demanding, and with two heats of six, the competition, even tougher. We have pitched our tent at the Grand Ngong Racecourse.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The second batch of six boldly walk where other bakers have walked before. The question is, who's bakes will hold and who's will crumble? Who will win the week's battle and be crowned star baker?

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers from heat one are back in the tent, after an elimination-free first round.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers from heat two are back for their version of biscuit week.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: This episode, the bakers take on desserts in a technical with a twist not seen before in the Bake Off tent.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The judges are at it again, with a new twist in the technical and a second pavlova challenge.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: Now the remaining three bakers from each heat come together for the ultimate face off of six, that will culminate in one baker being crowned the year's greatest amateur baker in Kenya. This is pastry week.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers have to put in the work as they knead, knock, proof and watch their bakes closely in this season's quarterfinal.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are tasked with producing some perfect patisserie in what is promising to be a tough semifinal.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The three finalists, Chetna, Joe and Charity bring their absolute A game as they battle it out to impress with their creations and be announced Kenya's greatest amateur baker.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: In the first technical challenge, contestants were to bake judge Kiran's special Swiss roll with jam. Talk about rolling into tumbling about the tent on the first day.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: It's bread week in the tent. The oven gloves are definitely off in this showstopper challenge where the bakers are tasked to showcase their depth of skill and talent in bread making.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: In the technical challenge, the bakers were to bake a dark chocolate with macadamia brownie. Judge Kiran was quite particular about this challenge.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: This episode's technical challenge is to make Judge Myra's lemon meringue pie. Some of the bakers have never done this before, while some of them are very confident.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The week's first technical challenge was a chocolate lava cake. But just what does it take to bake this delicious dessert perfectly?

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: This technical challenge is a classic bacon, mushroom and tomato quiche. June's favourite tart, apparently. The judges are looking for perfection.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: Biscuit week is here and we get to see the contestants try hard not to crumble under pressure. This episode's technical challenge is to bake checkerboard biscuits.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: For the signature challenge, the bakers were to bake a gluten-free cheesecake. They were allowed to customise it however they liked and that made our mouths water.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: The semifinals are here and we are getting closer to the grand finale. Fantastic Four had to make the perfect macarons for the technical challenge.

programme.title: The Great Kenyan Bake Off
programme.desc: For the first challenge, the contestants had to make the perfect Schichttorte. According to the judges, the perfect Schichttorte would be 20-layered, have a flawless glaze and an overall perfect finishing.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: This program welcomes 10 of the country's most passionate bakers to the iconic white baking tent to face Cake Week, and demonstrate talent and skill in the first of many challenges.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Bread Week and the bakers must create a focaccia for the Signature Challenge. In the Technical Challenge, they tackle Montreal bagels, while the Showstopper has the bakers creating a sweet bread centrepiece.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: This episode is Dessert Week and the bakers take on an elegant pie or tart. The Technical Challenge sees them tackling fondant fancies.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Canada Week and the bakers show off their pastry skills with Tourtiere in the Signature Challenge.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Best of Britain Week and the bakers take on a classic British trifle for the Signature Challenge.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Holiday Baking Week and the bakers face off with a traditional buche de noel in the Signature Challenge.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: This episode, the semifinalists take on French Patisserie in three technically difficult challenges that will determine the final three.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: Canada's final three bakers face off in the finale and the first-ever winner of the Great Canadian Bake Off will be revealed.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: Only eight bakers can continue on after completing three tough Cookie Week challenges. Starting with the Signature Bake, the bakers create Icebox Sandwich Cookies with a multicoloured design.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: The Baking Tent gets festive for the first-ever Celebration Week. Special Occasion Eclairs are first up in the Signature Bake; the French Patisserie classic decorated for any celebratory occasion.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: The annual Bread Week has arrived and the seven remaining bakers must prove they can rise to the occasion. For the Signature Bake, each baker puts their own twist on Babka, an enriched bread dough.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: This week the remaining six bakers must excel with pastry and not flake out in three Pie and Tart Week bakes. The Signature Bake has the bakers demonstrate their take on a classic Provincial Pie.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: Five bakers face off in Caramel Week in the Baking Tent. For the Signature Bake the bakers must prepare a batch of Florentines, an Italian fruit and nut cookie bound together with a gooey caramel base.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: Only four bakers remain for the delicately delicious Patisserie Week. The bakers start with hors d'oeuvres in the form of Vol au Vents, small puff pastry shells packed with a savoury filling.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Bake Off
programme.desc: The final three bakers return to the Baking Tent for the final bakes! For the Signature Bake, they'll take on the challenge of a Mousse Tart, a light, airy, and notoriously temperamental dessert.
